---
title: "CoreLogic"
page-layout: article
---

# CoreLogic

## Description

Property, mortgage, deed, tax, and real estate market database covering U.S. housing markets. Supports research in housing, urban economics, finance, and real estate.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Survey & Polling Data, Real Estate & Property Data
- **Access model:** Request Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Survey & Polling Data, Real Estate & Property Data

## Links

- [Access resource](https://search.library.yale.edu/catalog/99149180943408651)
- [Request access](https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=u76M3Tkh-E20EU4-h6vrXGa2PpecL_VHoOa9Jy4XGNVUMVJTT1BXNDdHVVAyREk5N09BWVdCVFE5RiQlQCN0PWcu&route=shorturl)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
